profile.title: Profile
profile.chatManager: Have a chat with the manager

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.info: Your new password must be at least 8 characters long.
changePassword.minLength: New password must be at least 8 characters
changePassword.successMessage: Your password has been changed successfully.
changePassword.failedMessage: Failed to change password. Please try again.

skills.title: Skills and Certificate
skills.allAdded: All available skills have been added

rtw.title: Right to Work
rtw.shareCodeHint: You can get your share code from the UK Government website at gov.uk/view-right-to-work
rtw.descNotStarted: Submit your share code to verify your right to work.
rtw.descPending: Your right to work is being verified. This may take a moment.
rtw.descApproved: Your right to work has been verified successfully.
rtw.descRejected: Verification failed. Please check your details and try again.
rtw.descExpired: Your right to work has expired. Please submit a new share code.

languageSelect.chooseLanguage: Choose your preferred language to get started

auth.enterInviteCode: Enter the invite code provided by your agency to get started.
auth.agencyConfirmMsg: You've been invited to join this agency. Please verify this is your correct agency before continuing with your registration.
auth.enterDetailsToLogin: Enter your account details to continue where you left off.
auth.enterDetailsToStart: Enter your details to get started
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.enterOTP: Enter the OTP code sent to the email address
auth.allSetDesc: You can now start accepting shifts, tracking hours, and viewing payslips.
auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.resetLinkSentDesc: We've sent a password reset link to your email. Please check your inbox and follow the instructions.

onboarding.profileDetailsDesc: Please provide your basic information to get started with your application.
onboarding.uploadProfilePictureDesc: Add a clear photo of yourself. This helps your manager and team recognise you.
onboarding.selectFromDevice: Select a photo from your device
onboarding.takePhotoDesc: Use your camera to take a new photo
onboarding.selectSkillsDesc: Choose all skills that apply. This helps match you with the right shifts.
onboarding.documentsUploadDesc: Please upload clear photos of your certification. This helps match you with the right shifts.
onboarding.bankAccountDesc: We need your bank details so your wages can be paid directly into your account each week.
onboarding.bankSecurityNote: Your bank details are encrypted and stored securely. They will only be used for wage payments via BACS transfer.
onboarding.accountHolderPlaceholder: Name as shown on your bank account
onboarding.sortCodeHint: 6-digit code found on your bank card or statements
onboarding.accountNumberHint: 8-digit number found on your bank card or statements
onboarding.rtwVerificationDesc: We need to verify your right to work before you can accept shifts.
onboarding.rtwInfoText: To verify your eligibility to work in the UK, we need a valid
onboarding.shareCodeHint: Case are case-sensitive and valid for 30days
onboarding.dobHint: Must match the date on your Home Office record
onboarding.shareCodeInvalid: Share code must be 9 characters (e.g. A23-994-23H)

nearbyAgencies.title: Nearby Agencies
nearbyAgencies.subtitle: Find agencies near you to get started
nearbyAgencies.noResults: No agencies found nearby. Try expanding your search or contact an agency directly.
nearbyAgencies.locationDenied: Location access was denied. Showing all available agencies instead.

agencyContact.noContactInfo: No contact information available for this agency.
agencyContact.howItWorks: Contact the agency to request an invite code. Once you receive your code, go back and enter it to join.
agencyContact.onboardingRequiredMsg: You need to complete the onboarding process before you can message an agency. Would you like to start now?

inviteRequest.title: Request Invite Code
inviteRequest.fillRequired: Please fill in your full name and email address.
inviteRequest.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
inviteRequest.successMessage: Your request has been sent to the agency. They will review it and get back to you with an invite code.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyDesc: You'll receive updates about shifts, approvals, and more here.
